title: Army survivor says Kuwait post was known target for Iranian drone strike before attack

title: Husband Arrested Days After Saying Missing Wife Fell Overboard
description: Brian Hooker, the husband of 55-year-old Lynette Hooker who vanished at sea in the Bahamas five days ago, has been arrested. Brian told authorities his wife fell overboard their small boat and was swept away by strong currents but his stepdaughter Karli, who describes her mother as an experienced sailor, is raising questions over his account. NBC’s George Solis reports for TODAY.
